Commands for taking screenshots, installing language packs, and testing on a Pebble watch.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Empty file (no analyzable contents).
- **[coredump.py](coredump.py.md)**: Command for taking a screenshot from a Pebble watch and saving the coredump to a file.
- **[install_lang.py](install_lang.py.md)**: Installs a language pack on a Pebble watch using a progress bar.
- **[test.py](test.py.md)**: Defines a test command class that prints a message when called.
